system.description:
Shaped Charge is the Demolitionist discipline for runners who chose precision over yield. Practitioners study explosive geometry like a sculptor studies negative space: the goal is not the explosion but the exact, predictable hole that follows it. They came up in military combat engineering, vault-breach crews, or apprenticeships with old hands who never raised their voice.

On the job, the Shaped Charge Demolitionist breaches without collateral. Their entry feature is Surgical Breach: they may declare a Shaped Charge against a structural element or armored door, treating its resistance as halved and producing a clean opening with minimal incidental damage to anything outside a one-meter cone.
system.grants: Surgical Breach: half resistance on structures/doors; collateral confined to a one-meter cone.

wizard.tagline: Open the door without ending the room
